story.soThat: tüm async operasyonlar (S3 upload, external API calls, database operations) için transient failures otomatik retry edilsin

acceptanceCriteria.ac: RetryService oluşturulmuş - src/common/services/retry.service.ts, configurable max attempts (default: 3), configurable base delay (default: 1000ms), exponential backoff: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay, generic type support

executeWithRetry() Method implement edilmiş - Method signature: executeWithRetry<T>(operation: () => Promise<T>, options?: RetryOptions): Promise<T>, RetryOptions interface with maxAttempts, baseDelay, context, onRetry callback, retry logic with exponential delays
Exponential Backoff Calculation implement edilmiş - Formula: Math.pow(2, attempt - 1) * BASE_DELAY, delay sequence: 0ms → baseDelay → 2*baseDelay → 4*baseDelay...
Logging Integration implement edilmiş - Use Common LoggerService (Epic 7.3), log each attempt, retry delay, success on retry, final failure
Optional Retry Callback implement edilmiş - onRetry callback support, invoked before each retry attempt, provides attempt number and error
CommonModule Export implement edilmiş - RetryService exported from src/common/services/index.ts, available to all modules via CommonModule import
Unit Tests implement edilmiş - Test file: src/common/services/__tests__/retry.service.spec.ts, test coverage: > 80%, test scenarios covering all methods and edge cases
Integration Tests implement edilmiş - RetryService with mock failures, retry logging integration, retry with S3Service mock, retry with DocumentGeneratorService integration

doc.title: Epic 6.5: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.snippet: As a developer, I want proje genelinde kullanılabilir retry mechanism, so that tüm async operasyonlar için transient failures otomatik retry edilsin. RetryService with configurable max attempts (default: 3), base delay (default: 1000ms), exponential backoff formula: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay.

doc.title: Epic Technical Specification: Common Cache & Retry Services
doc.section: Services and Modules, Data Models and Contracts, APIs and Interfaces
doc.snippet: RetryService provides exponential backoff retry mechanism for async operations. RetryOptions interface with maxAttempts, baseDelay, context, onRetry callback. Exponential backoff formula: 2^(attempt-1) * baseDelay. Delay sequence: 0ms → 1000ms → 2000ms → 4000ms...

doc.title: Testing Strategy
doc.snippet: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern kullanılır. Test coverage requirements: Services: 80%+. Mock objects doğru kullanılmış. Edge cases kapsanmış.

doc.title: Project Structure
doc.snippet: Common infrastructure katmanı: src/common/services/ altında shared services. CommonModule üzerinden export edilir, tüm modüller tarafından kullanılabilir.

doc.title: Implementation Patterns (AI Agent Consistency Rules)
doc.snippet: 8-group import order: Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events. Module structure: services/ klasöründe service dosyaları, __tests__/ altında test dosyaları.

doc.title: Story 6.5.1: Common Cache Service
doc.snippet: CommonModule oluşturulmuş ve CacheService export edilmiş. CommonModule @Global() decorator ile tüm modüllere export edilir. Service location: src/common/services/ klasörü. Testing patterns: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, unit testler __tests__/ klasöründe.

doc.title: Story 6.4: Document Generation Endpoints
doc.snippet: DocumentGeneratorService RetryService için placeholder interface kullanıyor. RetryService, S3 upload operasyonları için kullanılacak. Interface: executeWithRetry<T>(operation: () => Promise<T>, context: string): Promise<T>

artifact.reason: CommonModule'de CacheService ile birlikte RetryService de yer alacak. Aynı pattern'i takip edecek: Injectable decorator, dependency injection, CommonModule export.
CommonModule @Global() decorator ile tüm modüllere export edilir. RetryService'i de providers ve exports'a eklemek gerekecek.
RetryService'i de bu dosyaya export etmek gerekecek.
Placeholder interface. RetryService bu interface'i implement edecek. Interface signature: executeWithRetry<T>(operation: () => Promise<T>, context: string): Promise<T>
DocumentGeneratorService RetryService'i kullanıyor (placeholder ile). S3 upload operasyonları için retry mechanism kullanılacak.
RetryService LoggerService'i inject edecek (required dependency). Epic 7.3'ten gelen structured logging service. Methods: log(), error(), warn(), debug(), verbose().
RetryService test pattern'i için referans. Arrange-Act-Assert pattern, mock objects, test coverage > 80%.

constraints.constraint: RetryService MUST be located at src/common/services/retry.service.ts
RetryOptions interface MUST be located at src/common/services/interfaces/retry-options.interface.ts
RetryService MUST use NestJS dependency injection pattern (@Injectable decorator)
LoggerService MUST be injected as required dependency (Epic 7.3)
Exponential backoff formula MUST be: Math.pow(2, attempt - 1) * baseDelay
Default max attempts: 3, configurable via RetryOptions
Default base delay: 1000ms, configurable via RetryOptions
First attempt: Execute immediately (no delay)
Subsequent attempts: Exponential delay before retry (baseDelay → 2*baseDelay → 4*baseDelay...)
All attempts fail → Throw last error (no silent failures)
Logging MUST use LoggerService with context strings for debugging
Log each attempt: [context] Attempt {attempt}/{maxAttempts}
Log retry delay: [context] Waiting {delay}ms before retry attempt {attempt}
Log success on retry: [context] Succeeded on attempt {attempt}/{maxAttempts}
Log final failure: [context] All {maxAttempts} attempts failed
RetryService MUST be exported from CommonModule (same pattern as CacheService)
CommonModule MUST export RetryService via src/common/services/index.ts
Unit tests MUST be located at src/common/services/__tests__/retry.service.spec.ts
Test coverage MUST be > 80%
Test pattern: Arrange-Act-Assert
Mock LoggerService in tests (jest.fn())
Mock operation functions in tests (jest.fn())
Import organization: 8-group order (Libraries → DTOs → Services → Repositories → Entities → Interfaces → Enums → Events)
File naming: kebab-case (retry.service.ts, retry-options.interface.ts)
Class naming: PascalCase (RetryService, RetryOptions)
Generic type support: <T> for any Promise return type
RetryService MUST implement IRetryService interface (from document-generator module) or provide compatible signature
DocumentGeneratorService already uses RetryService placeholder - real implementation will replace it

interface.name: IRetryService
RetryOptions
LoggerService

tests.standards: Arrange-Act-Assert pattern kullanılır. Test coverage: > 80%. Mock LoggerService (jest.fn()). Mock operation functions (jest.fn()). Unit testler src/common/services/__tests__/ klasöründe. Integration testler test/ klasöründe. Test scenarios: success scenarios, failure scenarios, exponential backoff delay calculation, configurable options, logging calls, callback invocation, generic type support.

ideas.test: Test RetryService instantiation with LoggerService injection
Test executeWithRetry() with success scenario (no retry needed)
Test executeWithRetry() with failure then success (retry succeeds on attempt 2)
Test executeWithRetry() with all attempts fail (throws last error)
Test exponential backoff delay calculation: attempt 1 = 0ms, attempt 2 = baseDelay, attempt 3 = 2*baseDelay
Test logging calls: log each attempt, log retry delay, log success on retry, log final failure
Test onRetry callback invocation before each retry attempt
Test generic type support: string, number, object, array return types
